name: computer-vision-store-shelf-scanner
description: Evidence-backed retail shelf audits from mobile video.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/mobile/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
